title: InfiniteGoldenApple
description: Unlimited golden apples with continuous effects.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The InfiniteGoldenApple plugin introduces a unique item that provides the effects of a golden apple without ever being consumed. This plugin allows players to obtain a special golden apple that can be used repeatedly without depleting its quantity, making it perfect for prolonged battles or challenging survival gameplay. [Here is a breakdown of the plugin’s functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/57)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
